name: rian-workflows
description: Rian-specific sprint planning, implementation, and walkthrough workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Plan, build, and document Rian sprints
interface.longDescription: Project-specific workflows for planning Rian sprints, implementing one sprint task at a time, and generating walkthrough documents for the voice-first communication training POC.
defaultPrompt: Use $prd, $dev, or $walkthrough for the next Rian sprint task.
